user.title: Set up Hijri Calendar
user.description: Configure language and when the Hijri day changes.

sunset_unavailable.title: Sunset boundary unavailable
sunset_unavailable.description: Home Assistant could not calculate sunset for your location. Reconfigure Hijri Calendar to use local midnight, or set a valid location under Settings → System → General.

calibrate_date.name: Calibrate date
calibrate_date.description: Adjust the integration day offset for today using a small relative change or the announced Hijri date.

offset.name: Offset adjustment
offset.description: Add this many days to the current integration offset (-2 to +2).

hijri.name: Hijri date
hijri.description: Announced Hijri date for today (ISO, e.g. 1446-10-15). Computes and saves the required offset.

language.name: Language
language.description: Language for formatted fields in the response.

date_out_of_range.message: The date is outside the supported Umm al-Qura range.

sunset_unavailable.message: Sunset could not be calculated. Check Home Assistant location settings.

calibrate_no_config_entry.message: Hijri Calendar must be configured before calibrating the date.

calibrate_offset_out_of_range.message: Required offset {offset} is outside the supported range ({min} to {max}).
